cycle: scheduled cycle 2 (independent re-research; confirms morning cycle 1 directional calls)
protocol: ensemble 2xOpus + 2xCodex(gpt-5.5 xhigh) blind, arbiter aggregation (opus-4.8 session), half-anchor round-2 on Fed crux, verification layer passed
infra_note: Codex round-2 refinement on the Fed crux hung twice at the stdin-read stage amid ~10 concurrent codex processes (quant-loop orphans); codex family fell back to its valid BLIND estimate 0.67. Both families produced complete blind estimates. Directional signal robust to the gap.

items.title: Will the Federal Reserve Hike rates by 0bps (maintain) at their July 29, 2026 meeting?
items.rationale: Core: ensemble blind (0.66) AND CME FedWatch fed-funds futures (~0.756) both price P(hold) well below Kalshi's ~0.895 -> Kalshi overprices a July hold (NO edge; the only realistic NO path is a July HIKE, since cuts are off the table). Main risk / crux: does the year's telegraphed hike land at July 29 or a later SEP meeting (Sep/Dec)? Round-2 (Opus) moved 0.66->0.76 on the legitimate no-SEP-timing argument (hawkish new chair Warsh more likely to signal than surprise-hike), anchoring near FedWatch under the 0.7775 half-anchor cap; codex round-2 unavailable -> blind 0.67. Divergence: family div 0.09 (<0.10). Verification (FedWatch, Warsh chair May 2026, no-SEP timing) fed into round-2. Engine outcome: VETO (live daily-risk budget exhausted by quant loop).

items.title: Will Donald J. Trump attend The 2026 FIFA World Cup Final?
items.rationale: Core: host-nation president with a publicized plan to attend and co-present the trophy (FIFA's Infantino on Fox & Friends: 'no doubt' about Trump's role), same-venue 2025 Club WC precedent, and extremely loose YES criteria (a brief appearance or self-posted social counts). Main risk: only low-frequency disruptors (health/security/geopolitical) in the ~15-day window. Divergence: family div 0.03; verification confirmed (no health concerns) rather than invalidated blind. Engine outcome: SKIP (net edge +0.017 after fees < 0.035 threshold).

items.title: Will Kash Patel leave as FBI Director before Aug 1, 2026?
items.rationale: Core: departure needs voluntary resignation (Patel publicly defied the April Atlantic drinking/absence scandal and stayed) or Trump firing a loyalist (no indication) inside a <4-week window; Democratic resignation calls carry no formal power; FBI Director is a 10-yr statutory term. Main risk: sudden scandal escalation. Divergence: family div 0.01; all four clustered 0.04-0.05. Engine outcome: SKIP (net edge +0.023 < 0.035 threshold).
